pricingPlansSection1.description: Choose the perfect plan for your business. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for small businesses just getting started

plans.name: Professional

plans.name: Business

enterprise.title: Need a custom solution?
enterprise.description: Our enterprise plan offers tailored solutions for large organizations with specific requirements.

badge.saveText: Save up to 20% with annual billing

pricingPlansSection2.description: Simple, transparent pricing with no hidden fees. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.

items.question: Is there a long-term contract?
items.answer: No, all our plans are month-to-month. You can cancel anytime with no penalties.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
items.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for nonprofits and educational institutions. Please contact our sales team for more information.
